name: Invincible
overview:
Every kid wants superpowers. But not every kid's father is Omni-Man, the greatest superhero the world has ever known.

Invincible was adapted into a motion comic by Gain Enterprises using the Bomb-xx process, and broadcast on MTV2 in 2008.
